8152.one_line_summary: Content-addressable logic modules for deterministic proxy architecture deployment across chains.
8152.notes: Focuses on deployment and bytecode identity, not token or account functionality. Infrastructure-meta for cross-chain logic reuse.

8153.one_line_summary: Facet-based diamonds with on-chain selector discovery and deployment simplification.
8153.notes: Extends ERC-2535 diamond pattern with facet introspection; process/infrastructure-level standard.

8161.one_line_summary: Optional transferability of pending ERC-7540 vault deposit and redeem requests.
8161.notes: Extends ERC-7540 async vault requests with transfer capability; DeFi vault primitive.

8167.one_line_summary: Modular dispatch proxy standard with selector-based delegate routing and upgrade history.
8167.notes: Generic proxy architecture beyond diamonds; cross-cutting infrastructure pattern.

8179.one_line_summary: Minimal on-chain declaration of field element sub-ranges within EIP-4844 blobs.
8179.notes: Infrastructure for blob space coordination; meta-level data availability mechanism.

8180.one_line_summary: Authenticated messaging over EIP-4844 blobs with on-chain decoder and signature registry.
8180.notes: Extends ERC-8179 for blob-based messaging; infrastructure-level messaging primitive.

8183.one_line_summary: Job escrow with evaluator attestation for autonomous agent commerce workflows.
8183.notes: Agent-to-human or agent-to-agent job execution with escrowed budget; agentic coordination.

8196.one_line_summary: Policy-bound transaction execution for AI agents with verifiable credential delegation.
8196.notes: Layer 3 execute in modular trust stack; agent authorization with policy enforcement.

8199.one_line_summary: Sandboxed smart wallet for secure agentic automation with time-gated permission checks.
8199.notes: AA wallet variant for agent execution; isolation and time-bounded delegation.

8217.one_line_summary: Agent identity bindings to external NFT or token controllers via metadata registry.
8217.notes: Extends ERC-8004 agent identity with external token binding; identity composition.

8226.one_line_summary: Compliance delegation layer for AI agents operating on tokenized regulated assets.
8226.notes: Mandate framework for agents over RWA tokens; regulatory scoped delegation.

8255.one_line_summary: ERC-20 approvals with bounded expiration duration and revoking legacy spender support.
8255.notes: Token approval extension; security-focused fungible token enhancement.

8257.one_line_summary: Permissionless on-chain registry for AI agent tools with predicate-based access control.
8257.notes: Cross-cutting tool discovery and access gating; infrastructure for agent tooling.

8273.one_line_summary: On-chain agent attestation registry with transaction-scoped authorization via transient storage.
8273.notes: Per-operation attestation for agent authorization; agentic action gating with TEE/ZK evidence.

8290.one_line_summary: Shielded note teleportation between UTXO privacy protocols without public withdrawals.
8290.notes: Privacy protocol composability mechanism; cross-chain privacy infrastructure.
